title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: 1. **Medium (correctness/contract drift): latent adapter-bypass fallback remains in router path.** `route-task-handoff` still has a direct `gh workflow run` fallback that bypasses adapter manifest checks (`kernel-handoff.sh` / `fugue-bridge-handoff.sh`) at [route-task-handoff.sh:614](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:614). Current input normalization makes this mostly unreachable, but if a new target/value is introduced, it can silently violate sovereign-adapter boundaries (single-lane fallback). Minimal safe fix: make target dispatch explicit+closed (`kernel`/`fugue-bridge` only, otherwise hard fail) and remove direct fallback branch in [route-task-handoff.sh:582](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:582), [route-task-handoff.sh:610](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:610), [route-task-handoff.sh:614](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:614). 2. **Low (set `-u` robustness gap outside workflow contract): policy vars are still unguarded in script body.** `DEFAULT_*`/`CLAUDE_*` are referenced without `${var:-...}` in router logic at [route-task-handoff.sh:170](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:170) and [route-task-handoff.sh:189](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:189). Main workflow currently supplies defaults, so production path is covered at [fugue-task-router.yml:350](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml:350)-[fugue-task-router.yml:355](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml:355). Minimal safe fix: either set local defaults at script entry (matching workflow defaults) or add explicit required-var guard with clear error; add one regression test for missing-policy-vars behavior in [test-route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh). 3. **Info (validated risk no longer present): issue comment is now post-dispatch.** Dispatch happens before comment publication in [route-task-handoff.sh:550](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:550)-[route-task-handoff.sh:617](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:617), and this ordering is asserted in [test-route-task-handoff.sh:249](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh:249)-[test-route-task-handoff.sh:252](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh:252).
